2604.12502.title: SEATrack: Simple, Efficient, and Adaptive Multimodal Tracker
2604.12502.paper_summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in multimodal tracking reveals a concerning trend where recent performance gains are often achieved at the cost of inflated parameter budgets, which fundamentally erodes PEFT's efficiency promise. In this work, we introduce SEATrack, a Simple, Efficient, and Adaptive two-stream multimodal tracker that tackles this performance-efficiency dilemma from two complementary perspectives. We first prioritize cross-modal alignment of matching responses, an underexplored yet pivotal factor that we argue is essential for breaking the trade-off. Specifically, we observe that modality-specific biases in existing two-stream methods generate conflicting matching attention maps, thereby hindering effective joint representation learning. To mitigate this, we propose AMG-LoRA, which seamlessly integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for domain adaptation with Adaptive Mutual Guidance (AMG) to dynamically refine and align attention maps across modalities. We then depart from conventional local fusion approaches by introducing a Hierarchical Mixture of Experts (HMoE) that enables efficient global relation modeling, effectively balancing expressiveness and computational efficiency in cross-modal fusion. Equipped with these innovations, SEATrack advances notable progress over state-of-the-art methods in balancing performance with efficiency across RGB-T, RGB-D, and RGB-E tracking tasks. \href{https://github.com/AutoLab-SAI-SJTU/SEATrack}{\textcolor{cyan}{Code is available}}.
2604.12502.paper_summary_zh: 參數高效微調（PEFT）在多模態追蹤中揭示了一個令人擔憂的趨勢，即最近的性能提升往往是以膨脹的參數預算為代價，這根本上侵蝕了PEFT的效率承諾。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們介紹了SEATrack，一個簡單、高效且自適應的雙流多模態追蹤器，從兩個互補的角度解決這一性能與效率的困境。<lb/>我們首先優先考慮匹配響應的跨模態對齊，這是一個尚未充分探索但至關重要的因素，我們認為這對打破權衡是必不可少的。<lb/>具體而言，我們觀察到現有雙流方法中的模態特定偏差產生了相互矛盾的匹配注意力圖，從而妨礙了有效的聯合表示學習。<lb/>為了減輕這一問題，我們提出了AMG-LoRA，它無縫集成了低秩適應（LoRA）以進行領域適應，並與自適應互導（AMG）結合，以動態地細化和對齊跨模態的注意力圖。<lb/>然後，我們通過引入層次混合專家（HMoE）來脫離傳統的局部融合方法，這使得高效的全局關係建模成為可能，有效平衡了跨模態融合中的表達能力和計算效率。<lb/>憑藉這些創新，SEATrack在平衡RGB-T、RGB-D和RGB-E追蹤任務中的性能與效率方面，超越了最先進的方法。<lb/> \href{https://github.com/AutoLab-SAI-SJTU/SEATrack}{\textcolor{cyan}{代碼可用}}。
2604.12502.author: Junbin Su et.al.
2604.12502.authors: Junbin Su, Ziteng Xue, Shihui Zhang, Kun Chen, Weiming Hu, Zhipeng Zhang
